message:
fix: address code review findings (metadata recovery, compaction, error logging)

Critical fixes:
- Implement stuck metadata recovery: SessionMetadata.loadIfExists()
  detects "running" status from crashed sessions and sets to "interrupted"
- defaultFactory now returns a compact callback using the agent's
  client/model/provider, making compaction functional in real sessions
- Fix compaction race condition: snapshot history before passing to
  compactFn to prevent concurrent event accumulation from corrupting data

Important fixes:
- Log errors in handleEvent instead of silently swallowing them
- Wire InputHistory entries to readline.history for up-arrow support
- Expose resolvedModel getter on Agent and client/model/provider from
  CreateAgentResult for compact callback construction
- Add InputHistory.all() method for readline integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
